blockers.description: userEvent.click is async in v14 — tests call it synchronously inside act() which silently doesn't fire the click

decisions.decision: email inputs use type=text not type=email in LoginView
decisions.rationale: jsdom constraint validation blocks submit event with invalid emails, preventing JS validation error display

decisions.decision: No Tailwind — full custom CSS via globals.css design tokens
decisions.rationale: Ported verbatim from IC Podcast Recorder.html prototype
